# AGENTS.md

## Mission
Build and maintain AI Readiness Assessment Portal as a professional full-stack product.

## Priorities
1. Keep architecture boundaries clean.
2. Keep scoring logic explicit and testable.
3. Maintain good API contracts.
4. Keep the frontend polished and business-oriented.
5. Add tests when business logic changes.

## Build workflow
- restore
- build
- run tests
- do not leave broken code

## Avoid
- fat controllers
- mixed business/UI logic
- placeholder TODO implementations
- unnecessary abstractions
